zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Towthby於1463年出生在英國林可爾史爾格亞特 斯圖爾頓時，她的父親John Towthby44歲，母親Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey40歲。她於1483年與Michael Angevine在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1553年2月13日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿福德享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Towthby于1463年出生在英国林可爾史爾格亞特 斯圖爾頓时，她的父亲John Towthby44岁，母亲Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey40岁。她于1483年与Michael Angevine在英国英格兰林可爾史爾阿福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1553年2月13日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾阿福德享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Towthby was born in 1463, in Great Sturton, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Towthby, was 44 and her mother, Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey, was 40. She married Michael Angevine in 1483, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 13 February 1553, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Towthby est née en 1463, à Great Sturton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Towthby, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Michael Angevine en 1483, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 février 1553, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Towthby 1463 in Great Sturton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Towthby 44 und ihre Mutter Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey 40. Sie hat 1483 in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Michael Angevine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. Februar 1553 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Towthby è nata il nel 1463 nel Great Sturton, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John Towthby, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Michael Angevine nel 1483, nel Alford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 febbraio 1553, nel Alford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Towthbyが1463年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグレアト ストゥルトンで生まれた時，父John Towthbyは44歳，母Mrs Joan Jane Towthbeyは40歳であった。1483年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードでMichael Angevineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1553年2月13日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Towthby(이)가 1463년 영국 링코실르 그리트 스투르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Towthby(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 알퍼드에서 Michael Angevine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 2월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 알퍼드에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Towthby nasceu em 1463, em Great Sturton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Towthby, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Michael Angevine em 1483, em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1553, em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Towthby родилась в 1463 г. в местности грит стуртон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Towthby было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michael Angevine в 1483 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 февраля 1553 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Towthby nació en 1463, en Great Sturton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Towthby, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mrs Joan Jane Towthbey, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Michael Angevine en 1483, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de febrero de 1553, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 90 años.
